title: fix(studio): keep sub-agent badge expanded while streaming

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(playground-ui): auto-collapse sub-agent badge when processing completes
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: predecessor — same author's earlier fix for badge auto-collapse; this PR fixes a regression/edge case from that work

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: fix(core): prevent supervisor messages from leaking into sub-agent thread
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: companion PR — fixes a related but separate sub-agent issue

summary: Fixes sub-agent badges in the studio collapsing prematurely during streaming. When a supervisor delegates to a sub-agent, assistant-ui infers status='complete' as soon as any result field is present, causing the badge to collapse before the sub-agent finishes. The fix tags streaming results with a _mastraStreaming flag in toAssistantUIMessage.ts and gates the isComplete check in tool-fallback.tsx on the absence of that flag. Only 3 files changed (including changeset), very focused scope.
maintainerNotes: Well-written PR from a repeat contributor (same author merged #13558 for the original badge auto-collapse feature). The approach uses a _mastraStreaming flag smuggled through the result object to work around assistant-ui's status inference — this is pragmatic but slightly hacky (spreads part.output with `as any` cast). No automated tests, but the test plan is manual and clearly documented. CodeRabbit review passed with no actionable comments. CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (likely needs a maintainer to trigger the workflow for external contributors). Vercel deploy previews need authorization. Companion PR #13881 is also open and should be reviewed together.
